blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
